citations.description: pass1_chunk output loop — only drops findings with no in-chunk criterion; no contentless/empty-body suppression or deduplication.
partition_findings — mints IDs and splits findings; no deduplication or contentless suppression.
Exhaustive search for 'contentless', 'suppress empty', 'empty body', 'no checklist_item', 'deduplicate finding' in src/rebar/llm/plan_review and tests/ returned zero matches.

findings.criterion: Finding discovery de-duplicates findings and suppresses contentless findings (empty body / no `checklist_item`); a fixture reproduces B2/B4.
findings.detail: No implementation of finding-level deduplication or contentless/empty-body suppression was found in any of the plan-review discovery modules (`pass1.py`, `passes.py`, `orchestrator.py`, `xcheck.py`, `drift_floor.py`, or the workflow ops). Searches for 'dedup', 'contentless', 'empty body', 'suppress empty', 'no checklist_item' (as filters at the discovery stage) returned no matches anywhere in the plan-review source tree. Correspondingly, no regression fixture reproducing B2 (un-actionable, contentless 'AC quality issues' finding) or B4 (duplicated `rebase_on_behalf_of_uploader` findings) was found in the test suite.
findings.remediation: Implement a post-pass1 filter in finding discovery (or a Pass-1 post-processing step) that: (a) drops findings where `finding` is empty/whitespace-only or `checklist_item` is absent/empty (contentless suppression, B2); (b) deduplicates findings with the same `norm_id` / content fingerprint across chunks (B4). Add a regression fixture that injects contentless and duplicate findings into the discovery pipeline and asserts they are absent from the surfaced verdict.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
